query: UPDATE linkedin_posts SET linkedinUrl = CONCAT('https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:ugcPost:', SUBSTRING_INDEX(linkedinUrl, '_', -1), '/') WHERE linkedinUrl LIKE '%/posts/andreacinelli_%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute UPDATE linkedin_posts SET linkedinUrl = CONCAT('https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:ugcPost:', SUBSTRING_INDEX(linkedinUrl, '_', -1), '/') WHERE linkedinUrl LIKE '%/posts/andreacinelli_%'
